speaker: Unknown
text: Operator Greetings and welcome to CorMedix Inc. second quarter 2023 earnings call. At this time, all participants are in a listen-only mode. A brief question-and-answer session will follow the formal presentation. [Operator instructions] As a reminder, this conference is being recorded. It is now my pleasure to introduce your host, Dan Ferry, from LifeSci Advisors. Thank you. Mr. Ferry, you may begin. Dan Ferry -- Investor Relations Good morning and welcome to the CorMedix second quarter 2023 earnings conference call. Leading the call today is Joe Todisco, chief executive officer of CorMedix. And he is joined by Dr. Matt David, executive vice president and CFO; Dr. Phoebe Mounts, EVP and general counsel; Liz Hurlburt, EVP of clinical and medical affairs; and Erin Mistry, EVP and chief commercial officer. Before we begin, I would like to remind everyone that during the call, management may make what are known as forward-looking statements within the meaning set forth in the Private Securities Litigation Reform Act of 1995. These statements are subject to certain risks and uncertainties and include, but are not limited to, any of the following. Any statements other than statements of historical fact regarding management's expectations, beliefs, goals, and plans about the company's prospects, including its clinical development program, manufacturing activities, and NDA approval for DefenCath in the U.S. or other product candidates, future financial position, future revenues and projected costs, and reimbursement and potential market acceptance of DefenCath or other product candidates.
